details.effect: [fanfare] Put a Gale Arrow or Storm Arrow token into your EX area. [act] [engage]: Search your deck for a Forest Guardian's Bow, summon it, then shuffle. Activate only if you've played at least 5 cards this turn.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Natura card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field. Put a Naterran Great Tree token into your EX area, then deal the selected follower damage equal to the number of cards in your EX area named Naterran Great Tree. On Super-Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field. Put a Naterran Great Tree token into your EX area, then deal the selected follower and its leader damage equal to the number of cards in your EX area named Naterran Great Tree.

Ward. Once on each of your turns, when you play a Beast card, recover 1 play point. [fanfare] Do the following 2 times. "Put the top card of your deck into your EX area. If it's a Beast card, give your leader [defense]+2."
[evolve] [cost03]: Evolve this.
On Evolve - Destroy each other follower on the field. Each player summons a Lococo's Teddy Bear token for every follower on their field destroyed this way.
When playing this, [engage] 2 cards on your field named Naterran Great Tree: This costs 2 less to play. ---------- Give your leader [defense]+1. Draw a card.

[fanfare] If there's an Arisa, Evergreen Arrow on your field, place 2 arrow counters on this. Once per turn, when a [forestcraft] follower is put onto your field, place an arrow counter on this. [act] [engage], bury this: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals the number of arrow counters this had.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Put a Naterran Great Tree token into your EX area. Then, if there are at least 3 Natura cards in your EX area, give your leader [defense]+1.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.

This costs 1 less to play from the EX area. This costs 1 less to play if there's a follower on your field with "Setus" in its name. ---------- Select an enemy follower on the field and a Beast follower on your field. Deal 4 damage to the first follower and give [attack]+1/[defense]+1 to the second.
Choose 1. (1) Select a Puppetry token follower on your field and give it [attack]+2/[defense]+2. (2) Put 2 Puppet tokens into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost03]: Evolve this. Ward. [lastwords] Draw a card.
Ward. On Evolve - Give your leader [defense]+4. [lastwords] Draw a card.
[fanfare] Put a Naterran Great Tree token into your EX area. [act] [engage], banish a Naterran Great Tree from your field: Draw a card.
[fanfare][lastwords] Select an enemy follower on the field and give it [attack]-5/[defense]-5.
[act] [engage]: Put a Puppet token into your EX area. [act] [engage], banish a Puppet from your EX area: Draw a card.
Ward. [fanfare] [cost02]: Give this [attack]+2/[defense]+2. Strike - For the rest of this turn, this doesn't take damage.
Storm. [fanfare] Summon a Steelclad Knight, Shield Guardian, or Knight token. Strike - If there are 5 [swordcraft] cards on your field, give this [attack]+2.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] You may put a Naterran Great Tree token onto your field or into your EX area.

On Evolve - Search your deck for up to 2 Natura spells that cost a total of 2 or less, put them into your EX area, then shuffle. They cost 0 to play this turn. On Super-Evolve - Give this Storm. Recover 2 play points.
Intimidate. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage. If this wasn't put onto the field from hand, deal 3 damage instead.

This costs 6 less to play if there are at least 3 Officer token followers on your field with different names. ---------- [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Ward. [act] [cost01], discard this: Summon a Steelclad Knight, Shield Guardian, or Knight token.
Ward. On Evolve - Select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and destroy them.
Choose 1. (1) Search your deck for a Natura follower that costs 3 or less, summon it, then shuffle. (2) [cost03]: Search your deck for a Natura follower that costs 6 or less, summon it, then shuffle.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. [act] [cost02], [engage], bury this: Search your deck for an Erika, Loyal Swordsavant, summon it, then shuffle.
[evolve] [cost03]: Evolve this. [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Activate only if there are at least 8 cards in your hand. [fanfare] Draw a card.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
[fanfare] Summon a Shield Guardian and Knight token. Put a Steelclad Knight token into your EX area.
This costs 2 less to play if you selected a follower on your field with "Leod" in its name. ---------- Select an Assassin follower on your field and put it into its owner's EX area.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] You may put a Naterran Great Tree token onto your field or into your EX area.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
[fanfare] Discard a [swordcraft] card: Draw a card. If you discarded a spell, draw 2 instead.
Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 3 damage to it and its leader.
Intimidate. [fanfare] Select an Assassin card in your cemetery not named Countersolari Survivor and put it into your EX area.
Select a follower on your field with "Bayleon" in its name. Give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1, then you may put a Naterran Great Tree token onto your field or into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Discard a card: Choose 1. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. (2) Draw a card.
On Evolve - Put a Quadra Magic token into your EX area.

[fanfare] Banish a [runecraft] card from your cemetery: Draw a card. [act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and, if there are at least 5 cards in your banished zone, deal it 1 damage. If there are at least 10, deal 4 damage instead.

This costs 5 less to play if there's a Machina follower on your field that costs 6 or more. ---------- [fanfare] Bury each Machina follower that costs 6 or more. If you buried a 6-cost Machina follower, summon an Assault Tentacle token. If you buried a 7-cost Machina follower, deal 4 damage to each enemy follower on the field and give each other Machina follower on your field [attack]+2/[defense]+2.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Put a Repair Mode token into your EX area.

On Evolve - Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. From among them, you may reveal up to 1 Machina card and up to 1 Delta Cannon and add them to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. On Super-Evolve - Give this "Whenever you play a Machina card, deal 1 damage to each enemy leader and enemy follower on the field" for the rest of this turn.

At the start of your end phase, select an enemy follower on the field. If there are at least 3 Machina cards in your EX area, deal it 3 damage and draw a card. [lastwords] Put an Assembly Droid token into your EX area.

This can't be played unless there are at least 3 Machina cards in your EX area. You may play this for 2 more play points. ---------- Search your deck for a follower with "Belphomet" in its name, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle. Summon an Armored Tentacle token. If you played this for 2 more play points, summon an Assault Tentacle token.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Bury the top 2 cards of your deck. If you buried a non-[runecraft] card, draw a card.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
Rush. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 Machina cards in your EX area, give this [attack]+3 and Assail. [lastwords] Put an Assembly Droid token into your EX area.
Look at the top card of your deck. If it's a Machina card, you may put it into your EX area. Put an Assembly Droid token into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [lastwords] Put a Repair Mode token into your EX area.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. [lastwords] Put a Repair Mode token into your EX area.
This costs X less to play. X equals the number of cards in your banished zone. ---------- [fanfare] Draw a card. Banish a card from your hand.
Ward. [fanfare] Put a Repair Mode token into your EX area.
[fanfare] Choose 1. (1) Give your leader [defense]+5. (2) [cost02]: Deal 5 damage to each enemy follower on the field.
As an additional cost to play this, reveal an Academic card from your hand and put it on the bottom of your deck. ---------- Draw 2 cards.

Rush. Assail. [fanfare] Put a Curse of the Black Dragon token into your EX area. Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 2 damage and, if Overflow is active for you, deal 1 damage to its leader. [act] [cost04]: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 3 damage to it and 1 damage to its leader.

Rush. [fanfare] Banish X cards named Naterran Great Tree from your field: Choose up to X. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. (2) Search your deck for up to 2 Natura spells with different names, put them into your EX area, then shuffle. (3) Give your leader [defense]+2.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Discard a Marine card: Do the following 3 times. "Put the top card of your deck into your EX area."

On Evolve - Give each enemy follower on the field [attack]-X/[defense]-X, where X equals the number of Marine cards in your EX area. [act] [cost02], bury a Marine card from your EX area: Give this [attack]+2/[defense]+2 and Storm. Activate only once per turn.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Summon a Naterran Great Tree token.

On Evolve - Discard 2 Natura cards: Increase your max play points by 1. On Super-Evolve - Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. From among them, you may reveal up to 2 Natura cards and add them to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
This costs X less to play. X equals the number of cards named Naterran Great Tree that left your field this turn. ---------- Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. [act] [engage], bury this: Select a Rowen, Dragon Lance on your field. The next time it would take damage this turn, it doesn't.

On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.
Ward. [fanfare] Discard a Marine card: Draw 2 cards. If this was played from the EX area, recover 3 play points.
Shuffle your deck, then look at the top 2 cards. You may summon up to 2 followers from among them. Bury the rest.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and, if this was played from the EX area, deal it 2 damage.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
Bane. [fanfare] Banish a Naterran Great Tree from your field: Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. [lastwords] Summon a Naterran Great Tree token.
[fanfare] Summon a Naterran Great Tree token. [act] [cost01], banish a Naterran Great Tree from your field: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. Activate only twice per turn.
[act] [engage], put a Marine card from your hand into your EX area: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of Marine followers on your field.
When this is discarded, you may put it into your EX area. ---------- Summon a Naterran Great Tree token. If Overflow is active for you, give your leader [defense]+1 and recover 1 play point.

[fanfare] Put a Luna's Doll token into your EX area. [act] [engage]: Select an [abysscraft] follower in your cemetery not named Luna, Soul Keeper that costs 2 or less and add it to your hand. Activate only if there are at least 10 cards in your cemetery.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Put an A Horrible Night token into your EX area.

On Evolve - Choose up to 3. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 3 damage to it and 1 damage to your leader. (2) Deal 1 damage to your leader and each enemy follower on the field. (3) Deal 1 damage to your leader. Draw a card.

[fanfare] Summon an Assembly Droid token. Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of other Machina followers on your field. [act] [cost00]: Give this [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Storm. Activate only if there are 5 Machina followers on your field, and only once per turn.

Select a follower on your field and an enemy follower on the field. Give the first follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1, then deal the second follower damage equal to the first's attack.

[adv] [cost03], bury this: You may summon a Relic Goddess from your evolve deck. Activate only if there are at least 4 amulets on your field. [fanfare] Select up to 1 enemy follower on the field for every 2 amulets on your field and banish them.

On Evolve - Choose up to 3. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 3 damage to it and 1 damage to your leader. (2) Deal 1 damage to your leader and each enemy follower on the field. (3) Deal 1 damage to your leader. Draw a card.

[fanfare] Summon an Assembly Droid token. Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of other Machina followers on your field. [act] [cost00]: Give this [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Storm. Activate only if there are 5 Machina followers on your field, and only once per turn.

[adv] [cost03], bury this: You may summon a Relic Goddess from your evolve deck. Activate only if there are at least 4 amulets on your field. [fanfare] Select up to 1 enemy follower on the field for every 2 amulets on your field and banish them.
At the start of your end phase, give your leader [defense]+1 for every 2 amulets on your field. This can't be destroyed by abilities or take ability damage.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may put a follower from among them into your EX area. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you put a follower into your EX area this way, discard a card.
On Evolve - Put an Ancient Artifact token into your EX area. On Super-Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 4 damage to it and 2 damage to its leader.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.

While there are at least 10 followers in your cemetery, this has Storm. On Evolve - Draw a card. [act] [cost00]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage for every 5 followers in your cemetery. Activate only once per turn.

Choose up to 2. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. (2) Search your deck for a Viridia Magna, summon it, then shuffle. (3) You may turn 2 faceup evolved Natura followers in your evolve deck facedown. If you do, draw a card and recover 2 play points.

Combo (5) - Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader.

name: Curse of the Black Dragon TOKEN

details.effect: This can't be played unless Overflow is active for you.
